kohaerenz-explorer.description: Interactive explorer for the Kohärenz Protokoll knowledge base. Search entities, browse domains, check conflicts, validate schema, and navigate the project.

agent-rules.description: Maintain and generate AGENTS.md files following the agents.md convention. Provides utilities for extracting project structure, dependencies, CI rules, and ADRs.

concise-planning.description: Use when a user asks for a plan for a coding task, to generate a clear, actionable, and atomic checklist.

lint-and-validate.description: MANDATORY: Run appropriate validation tools after EVERY code change. Do not finish a task until the code is error-free.

git-pushing.description: Stage all changes, create a conventional commit, and push to the remote branch.

systematic-debugging.description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes.

senior-fullstack.description: Complete fullstack development guide for end-to-end web application development.

frontend-developer.description: React 19+ and Next.js 15+ expertise for modern frontend development.

backend-dev-guidelines.description: Node.js/Express/TypeScript backend patterns and best practices.

api-patterns.description: REST vs GraphQL vs tRPC selection and API design patterns.

database-design.description: Schema design, ORM selection, and database architecture.

stripe-integration.description: Payments, subscriptions, and Stripe integration patterns.

microservices-patterns.description: Microservices architecture patterns and best practices.

event-sourcing-architect.description: Event sourcing and CQRS architecture patterns.

python-pro.description: Master Python 3.12+ with modern features and best practices.

python-patterns.description: Idiomatic Python code patterns and conventions.

django-pro.description: The battery-included framework for full-featured apps.

python-testing-patterns.description: Comprehensive testing with pytest and advanced patterns.

async-python-patterns.description: Python asyncio mastery and async/await patterns.

data-engineer.description: Data pipeline architecture and engineering patterns.

airflow-dag-patterns.description: Apache Airflow DAG patterns for orchestration.

vector-database-engineer.description: Vector databases for RAG and semantic search.

domain-driven-design.description: DDD router: viability check, workflow sequence, and routing to strategic/tactical/evented skills. Start here for any DDD work.

ddd-strategic-design.description: Classify subdomains (core/supporting/generic), define bounded contexts, build ubiquitous language glossary. Produces the strategic artifacts before tactical design.

ddd-context-mapping.description: Define integration patterns between bounded contexts: Partnership, Customer-Supplier, Conformist, ACL, Open Host Service. Prevents domain model leakage across service boundaries.

ddd-tactical-patterns.description: Implement aggregates, value objects, repositories, and domain events in code. Refactor anemic models into behavior-rich domain objects with enforced invariants.

cqrs-implementation.description: Read/write model separation with CQRS patterns.

projection-patterns.description: Materialized read models from event streams.

e2e-testing-patterns.description: Reliable end-to-end test suites and patterns.

test-fixing.description: Fix failing tests systematically and methodically.

code-review-checklist.description: Catch bugs and issues during code review.

browser-automation.description: End-to-end testing with Playwright and Selenium.

ab-test-setup.description: Validated learning and A/B testing experiments.

commit.description: High-quality conventional commits with semantic versioning.

create-pr.description: Create pull requests with review-ready context.

requesting-code-review.description: Ask for targeted, high-signal code reviews.

receiving-code-review.description: Apply feedback with technical rigor and learning.

changelog-automation.description: Keep release notes and changelogs consistent.

git-advanced-workflows.description: Advanced git: rebase, cherry-pick, bisect, recovery.

documentation-templates.description: Standardize docs, handoffs, and project documentation.

memory-integrator.description: Mandatory skill for every iteration to manage the 'changing memories (not appending)' problem. Reflects on past iterations, extracts variables/lessons, and integrates them into an append-only appendix.

mnemonic-blackboard.description: Cross-session coordination and agent patterns using mnemonic

mnemonic-core.description: Core memory system operations, capture and recall.

mnemonic-custodian.description: Memory maintenance, deduplication, and health checks.

mnemonic-format.description: MIF Level 3 memory formatting templates and specifications.

mnemonic-integrate.description: Integration tools for wiring mnemonic into other plugins.

mnemonic-ontology.description: Custom ontology support with entity types and discovery.

mnemonic-qmd-reindex.description: Re-index memories for semantic search using qmd.

mnemonic-search.description: Advanced search patterns and iterative synthesis.

mnemonic-setup.description: Configure CLAUDE.md for proactive mnemonic behavior.

mnemonic:capture.prompt: Run the memory capture agent via the core mnemonic protocol

mnemonic:search.prompt: Run semantic and text search across the memory store

mnemonic:setup.prompt: Initialize mnemonic for the current project

mnemonic:status.prompt: View mnemonic memory statistics and active blackboard sessions

mnemonic:list.prompt: List available ontologies, namespaces, and memory configuration

mnemonic:recall.prompt: Recall related memories to the current context

mnemonic:integrate.prompt: Integrate mnemonic hooks into current CLAUDE.md

mnemonic:query.prompt: Structured memory queries via YAML frontmatter

mnemonic:custodian.prompt: Memory health checks and maintenance agent

mnemonic:validate.prompt: Validate memory formatting against MIF schemas

hooks.command: jq -c 'if ((.tool_input.command | test("python|tools/")) and (.tool_input.command | test("activate") | not)) then {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", updatedInput: {command: ("source /home/user/Dual-Kernel/.venv/bin/activate && " + .tool_input.command)}}} else {} end'
